pulse_cards.note: Requires HTTP server with /api/cards endpoints. Env vars (OPENPOT_SERVER_TOKEN, POSTGRES_PASSWORD) must be in .env.service, not just exported in shell.

calendar.note: Requires HTTP server with GET /api/calendar/events. See calendar-v2 insert for setup guide: Google OAuth, multi-calendar, date format rules, 9 pitfalls. After enabling, restart FastAPI: sudo systemctl restart openpot-server.service

voice.note: Client-side only — no server changes required. User enters ElevenLabs API key and Voice ID in OpenPot Settings on each device. Per-agent Voice ID and playback speed configurable in Agents tab.
